programs.title: American Pickers
programs.desc: While visiting the Outlaw family in Texas, Mike and Jersey kick off a massive scavenger hunt for the rusty remains of a legendary Marsh Metz motorbike. Meanwhile, in Alabama, lone Wolfe Robbie pays a return visit to an old petroliana honey hole and is prepared to pay up for the holy grail of signs.

programs.title: American Pickers
programs.desc: In nostalgic North Carolina, the Wolfe brothers go hog wild for a time-travel pop-culture pick-complete with a garage full of vinyl and three collections under one roof. Down the road in Texas, the choice stockpile at Brad's Automotive features top-notch petroliana, awesome signs, and the holy grail of pinball machines.

programs.title: Historic USA Gold
programs.desc: Secure the only .9999 fine pure gold coin with the dual date featuring 1776, the year of our nation's founding and the Liberty Bell privy. This unique 1776-2026 American Gold Buffalo comes graded perfect PF70UCAM in an exclusive 1 of 250 holder.

programs.title: Rare Limited Silver
programs.desc: Secure the lowest mintage Philadelphia Proof Silver Eagle ever issued by the US Mint with this 2026 Congratulations Set Silver Eagle graded PF70UCAM; this coin boasts a minuscule 60,000 mintage limit, housed in a signed First Day of Issue holder.
